goal_text: Task 10209: You want to find an expensive restaurant and it should be in the east part of town. Don't go for the first venue the system offers you, ask if there is anything else. Make sure you get the phone number and type of food of the venue.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
